query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  slug,
  atoll,
  overview,
  published,
  featured,
  displayOrder,
  bestTime,
  currency,
  language,
  coordinates,
  topThingsToDo,
  quickFacts,
  foodCafes,
  beachesLocalRules,
  practicalInfo,
  faqs,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
FROM island_guides
ORDER BY name ASC
